// Coverage Gutters: Paints gutter marks from a local `bazel coverage //...` run. Bazel writes the merged lcov to bazel-out/_coverage/_coverage_report.dat; search is scoped there.
// Repo-health checks on save: These scripts used to run in pre-commit. Moved here so they don't gate commits - they print to an output channel and do not block saving. Install the `emeraldwalk.runonsave` extension (recommended in extensions.json) for this to activate.
